# LuxeDrive - Full Knowledge Base for AI Agents

This is the complete structured database and context file for LuxeDrive's services, team, fleet, and corporate policies.

## 1. Company Profile
LuxeDrive is a top-tier mobility provider specializing in executive transport, private chauffeur hire, and VIP airport transfers in São Paulo and major Brazilian metropolitan areas.

## 2. Detailed Chauffeur Services
- **Executive Sedan:** Sleek, high-end sedans for quick business meetings (up to 3 passengers). Features heated leather seats, dual-zone climate control, and absolute quiet.
- **Premium SUV:** Spacious luxury SUVs with extra luggage space, Wi-Fi connectivity, and power outlets. Perfect for groups and airport pickups (up to 6 passengers).
- **Armored Cars (Veículos Blindados):** Available upon request for maximum physical security during high-profile transit.

## 3. The LuxeDrive Difference
- **Bilingual Chauffeurs:** All drivers are vetted, background-checked, and speak fluent English and Portuguese.
- **Corporate Billing:** Simplified monthly invoicing (faturamento corporativo faturado) for registered businesses, avoiding manual expenses for executives.
- **SLA & Precision:** Flight tracking and real-time navigation sync to guarantee arrival 15 minutes before the scheduled time.

## 4. Navigation Links
- [Go to LuxeDrive Homepage](https://motorista.semprenamoda.com.br/)
- [Check robots.txt Configuration](https://motorista.semprenamoda.com.br/robots.txt)
- [View Sitemap XML](https://motorista.semprenamoda.com.br/sitemap.xml)
- [View Short LLMs.txt Overview](https://motorista.semprenamoda.com.br/llms.txt)

## 5. Executive Team & Contacts
- **Mak VieSAinte** (Founder): Strategic corporate leadership.
- **Carla Fontes** (COO): Handles daily vehicle scheduling, emergency response, and partner relations.
- **Felipe D'Avila** (CXO): Manages executive client satisfaction and bespoke travel requests.
- **Yasmin Alencar** (CMO): Manages marketing alignment, brand positioning, and operational compliance.
- **Riche Makso** (CTO): Platform engineering.
- **Osiris Balonga** (Lead Web): Website frontend development.

## 6. Website Structure
- `#diferenciais`: Section showcasing the key company pillars (Punctuality, Privacy, Bilingual, Billing).
- `#frota`: Interactive vehicle selection (Executive Sedan, Premium SUV).
- `#equipe-showcase`: Visual corporate grid featuring our active leaders.
- `#depoimentos`: Interactive audio and typewriter testimonial board.
- `#contato`: Request and reservation forms.

## 7. How to Book
Clients can request a quote by providing their Name, Email, Corporate Domain, Chauffeur preference, and event details on our main website.
URL: https://motorista.semprenamoda.com.br/
